title: Tangy Crunchy Quick-Fix Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: A tangy and crunchy Chinese-style sweet potato dish prepared with minimal effort and a low-fat twist.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with garlic paste for a smoother texture

instructions: Preheat your wok or non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Slice the sweet potatoes into thin rounds. You can either leave them whole and slice while cooking, or cut off about 1 inch of stem if you prefer peeled slices.
In a small bowl, mix together oil, minced garlic, tomato sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, honey or maple syrup, cumin seeds, and black pepper until well combined. Set aside for later.
If using waxed sweet potatoes, peel them now while they are still warm from the peeler. Cut into thin rounds as above.
Add all ingredients from step 3 to the wok/pan and stir fry for about 2-3 minutes or until the vegetables start to soften.
Add sliced scallions and continue to cook for an additional minute.
Turn off heat, transfer to a serving dish, and serve hot.
